d:
Passive. After charging up for a longer time, Gwyneth's normal attack fires an arrow that deals [[360%]]<ATK> damage. Every point of ATK SPD or Haste further increases her normal attack damage by [[0.1%]].
Active. Gwyneth selects a tile and rains arrows over it and all tiles within 2 tiles. Enemies on each affected tile take [[270%]]<ATK> damage and become [[immobilized|immobilize]] for [[2]]s. For each wave of arrows, subsequent hits on the same target deal [[80%]] less damage. This skill prioritizes the area with the most enemies.
Increases damage dealt to [[290%]]<ATK> when this skill is used actively.
Increases damage dealt to [[310%]]<ATK> when this skill is used actively.
Increases damage dealt to [[330%]]<ATK> when this skill is used actively.
Increases damage dealt to [[350%]]<ATK> when this skill is used actively.

Passive. Gwyneth's normal attacks follow a 3-attack cycle. Every 3rd attack is imbued with the power of lightning, silencing the target for [[1]]s, dealing [[220%]]<ATK> lightning splash damage to all enemies within 2 tiles of the target, and stunning affected enemies for [[0.5]]s.
Increases the lightning splash damage dealt to [[240%]]<ATK>.
Increases the lightning splash damage dealt to [[260%]]<ATK>.
Increases the lightning splash damage dealt to [[280%]]<ATK>.

The 2nd attack in Gwyneth's normal attack cycle is imbued with the power of fire. It deals [[490%]]<ATK> damage and burns the target, causing them to take [[20%]]<ATK> damage every [[0.25]]s for [[4]]s. While burned, the target has their Vitality reduced by [[40]]. The Vitality reduction cannot stack.
Increases the damage dealt to [[510%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt to [[530%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt to [[550%]]<ATK>.
Increases ATK SPD by [[15]] during battle. If there are no enemies within [[1]] tile for [[3]]s, further increases ATK SPD by [[9]].
Increases ATK SPD by [[20]] during battle. If there are no enemies within [[1]] tile for [[3]]s, further increases ATK SPD by [[12]].
Increases ATK SPD by [[25]] during battle. If there are no enemies within [[1]] tile for [[3]]s, further increases ATK SPD by [[15]].

Gwyneth's normal attack damage is increased by [[20%]]. The 1st attack in her normal attack cycle is imbued with the power of both lightning and fire, and it burns enemies hit by the lightning splash.
Increases Gwyneth's normal attack damage by [[25%]].

When an arrow is imbued with the power of both lightning and fire, it also deals extra damage to the main target equal to [[10%]] of their max HP. This extra damage cannot exceed [[360%]] of Gwyneth's ATK. All damage dealt by this arrow also ignores [[60%]] of enemies' Phys DEF damage reduction, and [[4%]] of all other damage taken reduction effects. In non-boss battles, this second value is increased to [[12%]].
Increases Gwyneth's normal attack damage by [[30%]].

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, each normal attack increases ATK SPD by [[2]] and normal attack damage by [[1%]], stacking up to [[10]] times.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 20 ATK SPD, 20 Crit DMG Boost.

d: If there are no enemies within [[1]] tile for [[3]]s, Gwyneth focuses her aim, reducing the interval between her normal attacks by [[40%]].
